In [7]:
#rename the columns since there is no header
pca = pca.rename(columns=dict([(1,"Individual ID")]+[(x,"PC"+str(x-1)) for x in range(2,22)]))


#merge
pcaped=pd.merge(pca,ped,right_on="sample",left_on="Individual ID",how="inner")
